page_content:
GBHL497 Global Health Capstone (3 Credits)

In this seminar course, Global Health majors in their final semester integrate and apply interdisciplinary knowledge, skills, and perspectives to address a global health challenge. Capstone projects may focus

on research, system, policy analysis; or intervention development and assessment. Students will align their global health interests with their career goals, preparing for their next academic or professional steps. Prerequisite: Minimum grade of C- in GBHL200, GBHL210, EPIB301

and EPIB315; and must have completed or be enrolled in second GBHL Experiential Learning course.

Restriction: Global Health major in final semester; and must have earned more than 100 credits.
